name: Air
tooltip: Creates a powerful 60 ft line of wind for 10 minutes, pushing creatures and affecting ranged attacks.

name: Fire
tooltip: A cone of fire blazes from the hands for 10 minutes, dealing 3d6 fire damage to all creatures in range.

name: Earth
tooltip: Shape and move earth, stone, and sand within 30 ft for 10 minutes, creating difficult terrain or crude structures.

name: Water
tooltip: Raise, lower, redirect, or part bodies of water within 300 ft for 10 minutes, creating waves or whirlpools.
